name: BS 7430:2011 Earth Electrode Resistance
implementation_note: Iterative parallel-array convergence with spacing factor. The tool selects rod/plate/mat/foundation formula by electrode_type, computes single-electrode resistance, then iterates count until combined_ohm ≤ target_resistance_ohm. Inline LLM math diverges from validated Python by 10–25% depending on count and electrode type — this calc must NEVER be inline.

inputs.description: Site-measured or assumed (London clay 50, gravel 200, chalk 100, peat 30)
Design target; typical: 1 Ω for HV, 10 Ω for primary TT, 200 Ω for socket-RCD TT
Rod length, plate edge length, or mat overall dimension
Cover above the top of the electrode
Coefficient k applied per BS 7430 Annex F when rods are arrayed at spacing ≥ rod length

count_recommended.description: Minimum number of electrodes needed to meet target_resistance_ohm

target_met.description: true if combined_ohm ≤ target_resistance_ohm at count_recommended

formula_used.description: Which BS 7430 sub-formula was applied (rod-Dwight, plate, mat, foundation)

runtime_contract.response: { ok: true, result: { single_electrode_ohm, combined_ohm, count_recommended, target_met, formula_used }, error?: string }
